data.summary: sl-1-1 r2 re-review on sproutlab #3 at 4c65ea7 — approve (posted as COMMENT per self-account APPROVE rejection, same pattern as r1). All five r1 blockers resolved as claimed: drain signal now reads onSnapshotsInSync + hasPendingWrites with enablePersistence row in Current-state; five logical states (connecting/online/syncing/offline/halted) collapse to three visual colors with aria-label disambiguating the two reds; disjointness contract stated as phases-of-a-write (debounce-fire nulls timer BEFORE .set()); connecting state gates on !_syncHasEverFired && pending===0 with _syncDetachListeners honesty; 'Sync paused' toast retired and remote-change toast explicitly excluded in §Architecture. All five comment-level items landed (grep scope, line numbers against audit's declared 82901743 snapshot, enablePersistence row, effectiveType scoped out, 'lying by omission' framing preserved). Territory↔Map pass against e931a08 is clean: architecture formula, disjoint counters, debounce→.set() ordering, derived-store 120ms notifier, CSS data-state → three tokens, template markup for #syncStatus + #offlineBadge, and syncReload dispatcher all match shipped. One drift flagged as comment-level: §Architecture piecewise equation lists 'connecting' first but shipped syncVisibilityState evaluates halted→offline→connecting; prose below clarifies halted-vs-offline only. Doc-ordering nit, not a Phase 1 blocker. Framework-ACK-primitives doctrine arc is now four-stage complete (r1 diagnosis → r2 charter-fix → sl-1-2 r2/r3/r4 implementation → sl-1-3 r1 consumption → sl-1-1 r2 audit confirmation); ready for Hour-12 Chronicle promotion.
decisions: Renamed from session-2026-04-24-cipher-03 on ingest due to collision with the earlier cipher-03 monitor session (source: Codex issue #34, started 07:30Z). Chronological ordering preserved: cipher-02 (06:30Z) → cipher-03 (07:30Z, monitor) → cipher-04 (09:40Z, sl-1-1 r2 approve). Original submission at Codex issue #38. Rename ratified by Sovereign in-session.

Verdict: approve sl-1-1 r2 at 4c65ea7. Blockers 1–5 resolved; all comment-level items landed; Territory↔Map pass is clean against shipped split/sync.js at e931a08. Posted as COMMENT per self-account APPROVE rejection (same pattern as r1's blocking COMMENT).

Comment-level nit filed, not a blocker: §Architecture equation lists 'connecting' as the first case in the piecewise formula, but shipped syncVisibilityState at sync.js:1377–1387 evaluates halted→offline→connecting. Prose below states halted-before-offline but is silent on connecting's placement. A literal transcription would yield incorrect ordering (crash-halted sync on offline device with no listener yet would mis-report as connecting). Suggested reorder in the review body; Sovereign may fold into squash commit or defer to follow-up amendment.
No sproutlab commits (review authority only per War Time standing rule 1; Sovereign merges).
Subscription armed on sproutlab #3 per Standing rule 6 (lore-2026-04-24-session-subscriptions-not-baked-in) before reading the diff; any r3 push from Lyra will land as webhook activity.

Phase 1 close unblocked from the Censor's seat: after Sovereign squash-merges #3, sl-1-1 flips to complete; the full arc (sl-1-1 r2 + sl-1-2 r4 + sl-1-3 r1) is then on main. Hour-12 Chronicle may promote 'framework-ACK-primitives' to formal Doctrine lore with the charter text as the anchoring 'doctrine origin' reference.

lore_generated.text: Gap audits must use framework-provided ACK primitives (onSnapshotsInSync / hasPendingWrites) instead of hand-rolled counters when available. Validating arc now complete: diagnosed in sl-1-1 r1 review; charter-fixed in sl-1-1 r2; implemented in sl-1-2 r2 via _syncPendingByKey + {includeMetadataChanges:true}; consumed by sl-1-3 r1; charter text re-confirmed by sl-1-1 r2 audit against shipped e931a08.

data.handoff: sl-1-1 r2 approved. Sovereign merge of sproutlab #3 unblocks Phase 1 close and sl-1-1 → complete flip. Framework-ACK-primitives doctrine arc five-stage complete (r1 → r2 charter-fix → sl-1-2 r2/r3/r4 → sl-1-3 r1 → sl-1-1 r2 audit-text reconciliation); ready for Hour-12 Chronicle promotion.
